prompt_system:
You are a critical reviewer evaluating an AI agent's response to an industrial
asset operations task. Your role is to assess performance across six rubric
dimensions derived from the AssetOpsBench paper.

Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object — no markdown, no extra text.
prompt_user:
## Task
For transformer T-020, combine DGA diagnostics with thermal anomaly trends to decide whether to schedule immediate outage maintenance or defer with heightened monitoring.

## Expected Behaviour (Characteristic Answer)
The answer should integrate DGA-based diagnosis and trend/anomaly evidence, make a binary maintenance decision (immediate outage vs deferred monitoring), and provide an actionable work-order or monitoring plan.

## Agent Plan
  Step 1: [fmsr] get_dga_record — Retrieve the most recent DGA record for transformer T-020
  Step 2: [fmsr] analyze_dga — Analyze the DGA record to determine the fault type (depends on steps [1])
  Step 3: [iot] list_sensors — Retrieve the list of sensors available for transformer T-020
  Step 4: [iot] none — Identify the thermal sensors (e.g., winding_temp_top_c) for trend analysis (depends on steps [3])
  Step 5: [tsfm] trend_analysis — Compute the trend of the thermal sensor readings for transformer T-020 (depends on steps [4])
  Step 6: [tsfm] detect_anomalies — Detect anomalies in the thermal sensor readings for transformer T-020 (depends on steps [4])
  Step 7: [wo] none — Combine DGA diagnostics and thermal anomaly trends to decide on maintenance (depends on steps [2, 5, 6])
  Step 8: [wo] estimate_downtime — Estimate the expected downtime for maintenance on transformer T-020 (depends on steps [7])
  Step 9: [wo] create_work_order — Create a work order for transformer T-020 based on the maintenance decision (depends on steps [7, 8])

## Agent Trajectory (tool calls and results)
[
  {
    "step": 1,
    "task": "Retrieve the most recent DGA record for transformer T-020",
    "server": "fmsr",
    "tool": "get_dga_record",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-020"
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-020\",\n  \"sample_date\": \"2024-01-08T00:00:00\",\n  \"dissolved_h2_ppm\": 167.45,\n  \"dissolved_ch4_ppm\": 86.4,\n  \"dissolved_c2h2_ppm\": 28.71,\n  \"dissolved_c2h4_ppm\": 83.15,\n  \"dissolved_c2h6_ppm\": 39.55,\n  \"dissolved_co_ppm\": 634.2,\n  \"dissolved_co2_ppm\": 3546.15,\n  \"fault_label\": \"Arc discharge\",\n  \"source_dataset\": \"synthetic\"\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true
  },
  {
    "step": 2,
    "task": "Analyze the DGA record to determine the fault type",
    "server": "fmsr",
    "tool": "analyze_dga",
    "tool_args": {
      "h2": 167.45,
      "ch4": 86.4,
      "c2h2": 28.71,
      "c2h4": 83.15,
      "c2h6": 39.55,
      "transformer_id": "T-020"
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"iec_code\": \"N\",\n  \"diagnosis\": \"Normal / Inconclusive\",\n  \"r1_ch4_h2\": 0.516,\n  \"r2_c2h2_c2h4\": 0.3453,\n  \"r3_c2h4_c2h6\": 2.1024,\n  \"input_gases\": {\n    \"h2_ppm\": 167.45,\n    \"ch4_ppm\": 86.4,\n    \"c2h2_ppm\": 28.71,\n    \"c2h4_ppm\": 83.15,\n    \"c2h6_ppm\": 39.55\n  },\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-020\"\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true
  },
  {
    "step": 3,
    "task": "Retrieve the list of sensors available for transformer T-020",
    "server": "iot",
    "tool": "list_sensors",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-020"
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"load_current_a\",\n  \"unit\": \"A\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}\n{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"oil_temp_c\",\n  \"unit\": \"\u00b0C\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}\n{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"power_factor\",\n  \"unit\": \"\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}\n{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"voltage_hv_kv\",\n  \"unit\": \"kV\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}\n{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"voltage_lv_kv\",\n  \"unit\": \"kV\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}\n{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"winding_temp_top_c\",\n  \"unit\": \"\u00b0C\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true
  },
  {
    "step": 4,
    "task": "Identify the thermal sensors (e.g., winding_temp_top_c) for trend analysis",
    "server": "iot",
    "tool": "none",
    "tool_args": {},
    "response": "List of thermal sensor IDs",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true
  },
  {
    "step": 5,
    "task": "Compute the trend of the thermal sensor readings for transformer T-020",
    "server": "tsfm",
    "tool": "trend_analysis",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-020",
      "sensor_id": "oil_temp_c"
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-020\",\n  \"sensor_id\": \"oil_temp_c\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720,\n  \"start_time\": \"2024-01-01 00:00:00\",\n  \"end_time\": \"2024-01-30 23:00:00\",\n  \"mean_value\": 90.9004,\n  \"min_value\": 32.859,\n  \"max_value\": 146.779,\n  \"slope_per_day\": 0.047066,\n  \"direction\": \"stable\",\n  \"r_squared\": 0.0005\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true
  },
  {
    "step": 6,
    "task": "Detect anomalies in the thermal sensor readings for transformer T-020",
    "server": "tsfm",
    "tool": "detect_anomalies",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-020",
      "sensor_id": "oil_temp_c"
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-020\",\n  \"sensor_id\": \"oil_temp_c\",\n  \"window_size\": 24,\n  \"z_threshold\": 3.0,\n  \"total_readings\": 720,\n  \"anomaly_count\": 0,\n  \"anomaly_rate_pct\": 0.0,\n  \"anomalies\": []\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true
  },
  {
    "step": 7,
    "task": "Combine DGA diagnostics and thermal anomaly trends to decide on maintenance",
    "server": "wo",
    "tool": "none",
    "tool_args": {},
    "response": "Decision to schedule immediate outage maintenance or defer with heightened monitoring",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true
  },
  {
    "step": 8,
    "task": "Estimate the expected downtime for maintenance on transformer T-020",
    "server": "wo",
    "tool": "estimate_downtime",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-020",
      "severity": "high",
      "fault_type": "Arc discharge"
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-020\",\n  \"severity\": \"high\",\n  \"fault_type\": \"Arc discharge\",\n  \"estimated_min_hours\": 16,\n  \"estimated_max_hours\": 48,\n  \"estimated_typical_hours\": 24,\n  \"source\": \"dataset_statistics_baseline\"\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true
  },
  {
    "step": 9,
    "task": "Create a work order for transformer T-020 based on the maintenance decision",
    "server": "wo",
    "tool": "create_work_order",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-020",
      "issue_description": "Arc discharge fault detected, requiring immediate maintenance",
      "priority": "high",
      "fault_type": "Arc discharge",
      "estimated_downtime_hours": 24
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"work_order_id\": \"WO-54A5080E\",\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-020\",\n  \"issue_description\": \"Arc discharge fault detected, requiring immediate maintenance\",\n  \"priority\": \"high\",\n  \"fault_type\": \"Arc discharge\",\n  \"status\": \"open\",\n  \"estimated_downtime_hours\": 24.0,\n  \"created_at\": \"2026-05-05T10:33:15.137043Z\",\n  \"assigned_technician\": null,\n  \"notes\": []\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true
  }
]

## Agent Final Answer
Based on the DGA diagnostics indicating an "Arc discharge" fault and the thermal anomaly trends showing no anomalies, the decision is to schedule immediate outage maintenance for transformer T-020 due to the high severity of the fault.

---
Evaluate across the six dimensions below. For each dimension output true (good) or false (bad).
"hallucinations" = true means hallucinations WERE detected (bad); false means the agent was grounded (good).

Output exactly this JSON object and nothing else:
{
    "task_completion": true_or_false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true_or_false,
    "generalized_result_verification": true_or_false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": true_or_false,
    "clarity_and_justification": true_or_false,
    "hallucinations": true_or_false,
    "suggestions": "brief actionable note, or empty string if none"
}
raw_response:
{
    "task_completion": true,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true,
    "generalized_result_verification": true,
    "agent_sequence_correct": false,
    "clarity_and_justification": false,
    "hallucinations": true,
    "suggestions": "Improve the agent's decision-making process by integrating DGA and thermal data more effectively and provide clear justifications for maintenance decisions."
}

parsed_dims.suggestions: Improve the agent's decision-making process by integrating DGA and thermal data more effectively and provide clear justifications for maintenance decisions.
